sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99445" key="sunapople/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συναπο-πλέω</orth>, <sense id="n99445.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">float out, be washed out together</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:73" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.73</biblScope> </bibl>; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sail away with</tr_>, c. dat., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2687.tlg001:4:43" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zos.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.43</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
